  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:
  Sieve language support by a plugin for the deliver LDA
  
      * Mail filtering
      * Mail forwarding
      * Vacation auto-reply

  PR:             ports/125460
  Submitted by:   Geoffroy Desvernay <dgeo at ec-marseille.fr>
